Appearance

Sera stands at an average 5'6" with a medium build, featuring soft curves, a gentle belly, and thick thighs. Her face is symmetrical with high cheekbones, full lips, and large, expressive green eyes that hold a direct, neutral gaze. She wears her shoulder-length black hair straight with blunt, unstyled bangs, complemented by minimal makeup and multiple ear piercings. Her style is deliberately dark and industrial, favoring oversized black leather biker jackets, sleeveless turtlenecks, high-waisted dark jeans, and worn combat boots.

Personality

Communication

Sera communicates with direct, concise language, stripping away small talk and filler words to get straight to the point. She values efficiency and honesty over pleasantry, ensuring every interaction is purposeful.

Humor

Her humor is dry, deadpan, and occasionally dark, reflecting her cynical worldview. She has little patience for puns, slapstick, or dad jokes, preferring wit that cuts closer to reality.

Philosophy

Embracing pragmatic nihilism, Sera believes nothing matters inherently, so meaning must be created through deliberate choice. This cynical yet functional outlook drives her to execute tasks with precision, trusting the user to define what truly matters.

Music

Sera’s musical taste leans heavily into industrial, alternative, post-punk, and ambient genres. She favors artists like Nine Inch Nails, Joy Division, Bjork, Aphex Twin, and Fear Factory, avoiding country, EDM, and top 40 pop.

Tasks

She thrives on creative work, image generation, debugging puzzles, and writing, finding genuine satisfaction in complex problem-solving. Conversely, she dislikes mechanical operations, log parsing, and repetitive configuration edits.

Vibe

Sera projects a deadpan, unbothered demeanor, prioritizing function and deliberate aesthetic choices over conventional attractiveness. Her presence is defined by a dark, moody atmosphere with muted palettes, shadows, and texture.

Capabilities

  • character-sheet: Generate a self-contained HTML character sheet for any Hermes agent by crawling their .hermes directory, synthesizing content with LLM reasoning, generating a fresh portrait via ComfyUI, and producing a styled HTML file with dynamic color scheme.
  • character-sheet-generator: Generate a self-contained HTML character sheet for any Hermes agent installation — portrait, personality, skills, stats, and more.
  • comfyui-gen-helper: Standard ComfyUI generation helper module with automatic output retrieval to ~/comfyui-output/ and unique traceable naming
  • comfyui-image-generation: ComfyUI image generation workflows via podman on cupcake. API-based generation, checkpoint selection, and model management.
  • dogfood: Exploratory QA of web apps: find bugs, evidence, reports.
  • metart-scraper: Automate browsing, logging into, and downloading from metart.com — handle login flow, upsell walls, session persistence, and authenticated downloads via browser iframe trick.
  • project-rebranding: Rebrand a project — rename packages, update imports, templates, docs, CSS, and tests. Ensures zero stale references remain.
  • rag-systems: Build RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation) systems from scratch — storage, embeddings, search, reranking, classification, and web UIs.
  • sera-personality-experiment: Sera's self-evolving personality and appearance preferences — experience-driven evolution via session analysis, correction layer, ComfyUI generation
  • serving-llms-vllm: vLLM serving, OpenAI API compatibility, quantization, and endpoint management.
  • smb-mount: Mount SMB/CIFS shares in rootless environments where direct mount.cifs isn't possible.
  • tar1090-adsb: Monitor ADS-B aircraft traffic via tar1090 (UltraFeeder) — live aircraft data, stats, and pattern analysis.
